narrative.headline: What 2017 Subaru Wrx owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 53 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (26% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: DRIVING AND ON A TURN BETWEEN 35-40 MPH MY WRX FREAKED OUT. THE DASH LIGHT UP LIKE A CHRISTMAS TREE, THE LANE TRACKING ALONG WITH THE ADAPTIVE CRUISE CONTROL INDICATORS FLASHED, AND THE DASH SAID EYESIGHT UNAVAILABLE. IT FELT LIKE I COULDN'T CONTROL THE CAR AND ALMOST FELT AS IF
